headlines.title: Trump, flyovers and bloody fights: What it was like inside UFC Freedom 250
headlines.description: The mixed martial arts event saw 14 fighters compete Sunday night at the White House for President Donald Trump.

headlines.title: Supreme Court rejects former Trump adviser’s bid to revive James Comey lawsuit
headlines.description: The Supreme Court rejected former Trump campaign adviser Carter Page’s attempt to revive a lawsuit against former FBI Director James Comey and others over their roles in a federal investigation into Russian interference in the 2016 election.

headlines.title: Supreme Court turns away challenge to New York firearms liability law
headlines.description: WASHINGTON — The Supreme Court on Monday rejected a challenge to a New York law that sets out a legal pathway to hold gunmakers accountable for harm caused by their weapons

headlines.title: Former Sen. Mitch McConnell Hospitalized, Spokesperson Says
headlines.description: Former Republican Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell was hospitalized Sunday. There’s no word on his condition or why he was hospitalized but his spokesperson says the 84-year-old is “receiving excellent care.”

headlines.title: Trump Celebrates 80th Birthday With UFC Fight at White House
headlines.description: To celebrate his 80th birthday and the nation’s 250th anniversary, President Donald Trump hosted an unprecedented UFC fight in the backyard of the White House. The $60 million event brought the UFC’s 8-sided cage and a mixed martial arts extravaganza to the 4,000 attendees which included cabinet members and dignitaries. Now, Trump is headed to Geneva for the G-7 summit in France amid geopolitical rifts. NBC’s Kelly O’Donnell reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: US and Iran Reach Framework Deal to End War, Reopen Hormuz
headlines.description: An agreement has been reached between the United States and Iran to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, according to President Donald Trump and Iranian officials. A document signing is expected to take place Friday. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports on the details of the deal for TODAY.

headlines.title: U.S. deportation tracker: Counting arrests, detentions and border crossings
headlines.description: President Donald Trump came into office promising the largest mass deportation in U.S history, targeting the more than 10 million unauthorized migrants living in the United States.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: U.S. and Iran reach framework deal to end war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: The United States and Iran have reached an agreement to end fighting and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, according to President Donald Trump and Iranian officials.

headlines.title: Trump to face European allies at odds with him over two wars at G7 summit
headlines.description: Trump will touch down in France for the G7 meeting with allies who are at odds with him over a pair of wars.

headlines.title: Sen. Mitch McConnell admitted to the hospital, spokesperson says
headlines.description: Sen. Mitch McConnell, R-Ky., the former Senate majority leader, was hospitalized on Sunday, according to his spokesperson.“Senator McConnell was admitted to the hospital this morning,” spokesperson David Popp said in a statement.
